title: onobrychis arenaria subsp. tommasinii
intro: Onobrychis arenaria subsp. tommasinii, also known as Tommasini's sainfoin, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood pressure. Tommasini's sainfoin can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, making it a versatile option for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
